triggers.name: Enemy timer: Atol's Spectral Shackles
triggers.comments: ~2m30s at level 50 (formula 1, cap 25 ticks); CC; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Wizard level 51. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Bonds of Force
triggers.comments: ~2m00s at level 50 (formula 1, cap 20 ticks); CC; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Wizard level 27. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Elnerick's Entombment of Ice
triggers.pattern: ^You begin casting Elnerick['`]s Entombment of Ice(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))?\.$
triggers.comments: ~0m24s at level 50 (formula 6, cap 4 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Wizard level 35. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Fetter

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Immobilize
triggers.comments: ~1m00s at level 50 (formula 8, cap 10 ticks); CC; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Wizard level 39. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Paralyzing Earth
triggers.comments: ~3m00s at level 50 (formula 8, cap 30 ticks); CC; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Wizard level 48. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Atol's Spectral Shackles
triggers.pattern: ^Your Atol['`]s Spectral Shackles(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
